slow::reaction_or_opportunity_restrictio.issue: Actionable open: Reaction/opportunity restrictions need explicit action-permission fields.
slow::reaction_or_opportunity_restrictio.recommendedJsonChange: Use Utility Options as interim data.

slow::repeat_save_or_recurring_check.closedReason: Closed residual duplicate after the concrete Slow repeat-save row was resolved with structured Recurring Mechanics and runtime recurringMechanics data.
slow::repeat_save_or_recurring_check.issue: Actionable open: Recurring checks sometimes need timing, action cost, and repeated damage/status branches beyond repeatSave.
slow::repeat_save_or_recurring_check.recommendedJsonChange: Use repeatSave where possible and Utility Options otherwise.

slow::object_stats_or_damageability.issue: Actionable open: Object stats, structure durability, or object transformations need explicit AC/HP/passability/damageability fields.
slow::object_stats_or_damageability.recommendedJsonChange: Use current spatial/utility fields until propagation.

speak-with-dead::choice_or_mode.issue: Actionable open: Mode choices need first-class mode/option fields when a spell exposes several distinct operations.
speak-with-dead::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a choice/mode bucket with option-specific targets/effects.
speak-with-dead::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing Utility Options or descriptions until mode schema propagation.

speak-with-dead::message_or_communicatio.issue: Actionable open: Communication rules need sender/recipient, language, plane, and message-shape fields.
speak-with-dead::message_or_communicatio.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing Utility Options as interim data.

speak-with-dead::summon_or_controlled_en.issue: Actionable open: Summoned/controlled entities need command, initiative, stat, duration, and ownership fields.
speak-with-dead::summon_or_controlled_en.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing SUMMONING/Utility Options as interim data.

speak-with-dead::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: Actionable open: Wards, glyph triggers, and delayed triggered effects need trigger-condition and stored-effect fields.
speak-with-dead::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedJsonChange: Use current Utility Options as interim data.

speak-with-dead::social_or_knowledge_eff.issue: Actionable open: Knowledge, attitude, speech, or memory effects need explicit social/knowledge fields.
speak-with-dead::social_or_knowledge_eff.recommendedJsonChange: Use current status/utility text as interim representation.

speak-with-dead::status_or_state_change.issue: Actionable open: Some state changes are not simple D&D conditions and need state-change fields.
speak-with-dead::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add state-change bucket fields for non-condition states.
speak-with-dead::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Use STATUS_CONDITION where possible and Utility Options elsewhere.

speak-with-dead::conditional_ending.issue: The phrase 'until the spell ends' scopes the question window and is not an early-ending trigger. The manual Speak with Dead row remains open for question-count and 10-day lockout fields.
speak-with-dead::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No conditional-ending field needed for this residual row; preserve the manual question-limit/cooldown row.
speak-with-dead::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No conditionalEndings JSON entry needed for this residual row.

speak-with-plants::terrain_or_surface.issue: Actionable open: Terrain/surface rules need stronger terrain, surface, passability, and environmental-state fields when not already covered by TERRAIN.
speak-with-plants::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/utility representation as interim data.

speak-with-plants::message_or_communicat.issue: Actionable open: Communication rules need sender/recipient, language, plane, and message-shape fields.

speak-with-plants::summon_or_controlled_.issue: Actionable open: Summoned/controlled entities need command, initiative, stat, duration, and ownership fields.
speak-with-plants::summon_or_controlled_.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing SUMMONING/Utility Options as interim data.

speak-with-plants::environmental_change.issue: Actionable open: Environmental changes need reusable world-state fields for weather, obscurement, growth, gas, liquids, and hazards.
speak-with-plants::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/damage/utility fields as interim data.
